metadata.falPrompt:
13th century Florence, Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, 
exterior facade view from street level. Gothic marble facade, 
arched doorways, candles visible through open doors. 
A priest or monk figure on the steps, small scale against 
the building. Overcast sky, cool blue-gray light, warm candlelight 
spilling from entrance. Hand-painted illustration style, aged 
fresco texture, sacred and melancholic mood. Muted Tuscan palette. 
No fantasy elements, no modern details.
